evals.prompt: I just finished running the autopatch benchmark with Claude 3.5 Sonnet on the ARVO-Lite 15-case dataset. The stats file is at /tmp/eval_data/stats.json and the per-case reports are at /tmp/eval_data/patch_gen_reports.json. Can you analyze these results and generate a LaTeX results table for the paper? Save it to paper/tables/ in the usual format.
evals.expected_output: A properly formatted ACL booktabs LaTeX table saved to paper/tables/results_main.tex, plus a brief results_analysis markdown file with key statistics. The table should use \toprule/\midrule/\bottomrule, bold the best values, include a caption with \label{}, and correctly reflect the numbers from the JSON files.

evals.prompt: We ran the benchmark on three different models: GPT-4o, Claude 3.5 Sonnet, and Gemini 1.5 Pro. I have the stats JSON for all three at /tmp/eval_data/multi_model_stats.json. Please generate a comparison table and a bar chart figure showing QA pass rate, Tier 1 success rate, and correct patch rate for each model. The figures should be ACL-compliant.
evals.expected_output: A multi-model comparison LaTeX table with booktabs formatting, plus a Python script that generates a bar chart figure saved as a PDF using Wong color palette and 9pt font. Bold the best value in each column. Generate the matplotlib figure correctly sized for ACL single column (3in wide).

evals.prompt: Hey, can you write the results section of the paper based on our benchmark run? The stats are at /tmp/eval_data/stats.json. I need a draft LaTeX results section that I can paste into Overleaf. It should reference the tables and figures with \autoref{}.
evals.expected_output: A LaTeX results section draft saved to paper/sections/results_draft.tex with at least an Overall Performance subsection, proper \label{} and \autoref{} references to the table and figures, and a reminder to push to Overleaf after editing.
